__doc.desc: To be used on the element forming the background of a `bg-aspect-ratio()` parent/wrapper

system.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol'

__doc.desc: Animation which rotates element a full turn, looping indefinitely
Animation which shrinks the height from given initial value to zero. Target element must NOT have padding (use a wrapper if necessary).
Sets aspect ratio of background. Use with `bg-aspect-ratio-object` on child element.
Assigns an adjusted version of `base` color to new variable `name`.

adjust-color.--{0}: oklch(from var(--{1}) calc(l + {2}) calc(c + {3}) calc(h + {4}) / calc(a + {5}))

__doc.desc: Assigns an luminance-adjusted version of `base` color to new variable `name`.

lighten-color.--{0}: oklch(from var(--{1}) calc(l + {2}) c h / a)

__doc.desc: Assigns an chroma-adjusted version of `base` color to new variable `name`.

saturate-color.--{0}: oklch(from var(--{1}) l calc(c + {2}) h / a)

__doc.desc: Assigns an hue-rotated version of `base` color to new variable `name`.

rotate-color.--{0}: oklch(from var(--{1}) l c calc(h + {2}) / a)

__doc.desc: Sets `fill` color using CSS light-dark() function
Sets `stroke` color using CSS light-dark() function
Sets appearance (incl. `-webkit` prefixed version) to given value
